## Changes

> - *Summarize the main changes in this PR in a few concise bullets.*
> - *Focus on what changed in behavior, APIs, or structure rather than implementation details.*

## Relevant links

> - *List of links to related issues, PRs, design notes, or discussions that provide context.*

## Reasoning

> - *Summarize motivation for this PR in bullet points.*
> - *Mention what problem it solves, what gap it addresses, and why this work is needed now.*

## Explanation

> - *Summarize key implementation choices, trade-offs, and alternatives considered in bullet points.*
> - *Call out any assumptions or constraints reviewers should know.*

## Additional notes

> - *Mention future work and limitations.*

## Checklist

- [ ] Introduces breaking changes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] Updated documentation/comments where needed
